problem_statement: The system currently lacks a mechanism for customers to cancel their bookings and receive a refund. The cancellation workflow needs to verify the booking status, perform the cancellation, and provide clear explanations regarding the refund process.
goal: Implement a customer-facing cancellation feature that verifies bookings, processes cancellations, and clearly communicates refund outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully cancel a booking if eligible for a refund.
System verifies booking status before allowing cancellation.
User receives a clear explanation of the refund process and outcome after cancellation.
repo_summary: README.md(1), backend(99), docker-compose.yml(1), frontend(8), run_backend.sh(1), run_frontend.sh(1), run_local.sh(1), scripts(7)
localization_rationale: The bookings route will handle the API requests for cancelling bookings, while the booking service will contain the business logic for processing cancellations and applying any refund rules.
